summary: 54 tests passed, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: Prerequisite gate: check has_architecture_context() — if false, inform user and offer to chain to /system-arch
completion_promises.evidence: Spec contains a dedicated 'Prerequisite Gate' section with has_architecture_context() check via SystemPlanGraphiti, user-facing NO_ARCHITECTURE_CONTEXT_MESSAGE, and offer to chain to /system-arch. Also covered in CRITICAL EXECUTION INSTRUCTIONS Step 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Read bounded contexts and structural decisions from Graphiti (project_architecture group)
completion_promises.evidence: Spec's Phase 0 (Context Loading) reads from project_architecture group via SystemPlanGraphiti.get_architecture_summary() and get_relevant_context_for_topic(). References bounded contexts extraction and ADR loading.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Per-bounded-context interactive design flow: API contract design, Multi-protocol surface design, Data model design, Protocol selection (MCP, A2A, ACP)
completion_promises.evidence: Phase 1 has 4 steps per bounded context: Step 1 (API Contract Design with endpoints, schemas, auth), Step 2 (Multi-Protocol Surface Design with REST/GraphQL/MCP/A2A/ACP/Events selection), Step 3 (Data Model Design with entities, relationships, invariants), Step 4 (Checkpoint with [C]ontinue/[R]evise/[D]DR?/[S]kip).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Mandatory output artefacts: API contracts (api-contract.md.j2), OpenAPI 3.1 (docs/design/openapi.yaml), MCP tool definitions (docs/design/mcp-tools.json), A2A task schemas (docs/design/a2a-schemas.yaml), Data model definitions, C4 Component diagrams (component-l3.md.j2), DDRs (ddr.md.j2)
completion_promises.evidence: Phase 3 (Output Artefact Generation) has 7 sub-sections (3.1-3.7) covering all mandatory artefacts. Output Artefact Summary table lists each artefact with path, template, and condition. References api-contract.md.j2, ddr.md.j2, component-l3.md.j2 templates and DesignWriter class.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Mandatory C4 L3 review gate: diagrams require explicit user approval
completion_promises.evidence: Phase 3.5 is a dedicated 'Mandatory C4 L3 Review Gate' section. Shows [A]pprove / [R]evise / [R]eject interaction per diagram. States 'design output cannot be finalised without explicit approval'. Includes >3 components threshold (ASSUM-012).

completion_promises.criterion_text: OpenAPI validation quality gate: validate generated spec with openapi-spec-validator
completion_promises.evidence: Phase 4 (OpenAPI Validation Quality Gate) validates with openapi-spec-validator subprocess call. Includes retry logic (max 2 attempts) and handles missing validator gracefully.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Graphiti seeding: all artefacts seeded into project_design and api_contracts groups
completion_promises.evidence: Phase 5 (Graphiti Seeding) uses SystemDesignGraphiti with upsert_api_contract(), upsert_data_model(), upsert_design_decision() methods. References both project_design and api_contracts groups explicitly.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Contradiction detection: flag proposed contracts that violate existing ADRs
completion_promises.evidence: Phase 2 (Contradiction Detection) queries project_decisions group for existing ADRs and compares against proposed contracts. Shows specific contradiction examples (Events vs synchronous ADR, GraphQL vs REST-only ADR). Offers [R]evise/[S]upersede/[A]ccept risk options.

Dedicated 'Graceful Degradation' section covers three scenarios: Graphiti Unavailable (continue with markdown only), Partial Graphiti Failure (track and report failed seeds), Missing Architecture Context. GRAPHITI_UNAVAILABLE_MESSAGE constant defined.

completion_promises.criterion_text: DDR numbering: scan docs/design/decisions/ for next available number
completion_promises.evidence: Dedicated 'DDR Numbering' section with scan_next_ddr_number() from guardkit.planning.design_writer. Shows scanning docs/design/decisions/ directory. Used in Phase 1 Step 4 during inline DDR capture.

CRITICAL EXECUTION INSTRUCTIONS FOR CLAUDE section with 9 numbered steps (Step 1-9), 'What NOT to Do' list with 9 prohibitions, and Message Constants section with NO_ARCHITECTURE_CONTEXT_MESSAGE, GRAPHITI_UNAVAILABLE_MESSAGE, SESSION_CANCELLED_MESSAGE.

Dedicated 'Error Handling' section covers: Empty Answers (placeholder), Cancelled Session (partial output), Invalid Protocol Selection (re-prompt), Graphiti Error During Seeding (warn and continue), OpenAPI Validator Not Installed (graceful skip).
